Channels

  • The best channels (lower cost per user)

    • Viral referrals, social media, email marketing, blogs, SEO
    • Focus on lower hanging fruit
    • Talk about your product ALL the time when networking
    • Tap into other people's audiences

Paid vs Organic

  • Paid

    • Different tools
    • Google Adwords, Facebook Ads, AdRoll, YouTube Ads, Virool, Ambassador (affiliate marketing), Podcast ads, Newsletter and website sponsorships
    • An ad is like a mini-landing page (great place to test copy)
    • Ad platform research tools
    • Google Keyword
    • Moat.com
    • Groupon
    • Facebook
    • 3 ways to buy ads
    • impression (CPM)
    • click (CPC)
    • action (CPA)
    • Important terms
    • Click-through rate (CTR)
    • Click-through conversion (CTC)
    • View-through conversion (VTC)
    • Attribution (first-tough vs last-touch)

  • Organic

    • Put out useful content (great if your app can create its own content like Genius and Yelp)
    • Medium
    • Guest blog posting
    • YouTube
    • Slideshare
    • Wikipedia
    • Quora
    • Meetups
    • SEO

    • 1: have good content

    • each page targets a specific keyword

    • Hacks

      • Slidshare links back to the site
      • Press releases (market wired)
      • Backlinko.com -> Moving man technique

PR

  • Blogs and publications

  • How to get almost anyone's email address

    • List out different publications and find the journalists
    • Email permutator
    • Rapportive to verify address
